0.1.1.description:
# What's new
- Fixed some errors inside of the client caused by the name change
0.1.1.title: Gato Roboto B-Side v0.1.1

0.2.0.description:
# What's new
## Mod revamp
The mod has been fully reworked, allowing for some new features
### New custom item notifications
- Whenever you get an item, an unique animation plays, showing more clearly what item you got
  - It will also not inhibit your movement, making gameplay more smooth
- The old location cutscene have returned, with slight adjustments
  - Item locations now show one random line from the game, enjoy!
### Bugfixes
- Uses the proper settings file now
- Hot boy hardlocks
- Fixed an issue with reloading the savefile
## Updated logic
### New difficulty option
You can now select between 3 different tiers of difficulty:
- Easy: Most tricky checks have been reduced in difficulty
- Hard: The base logic without Cat Vent Skip and Vent Mashing
- Vanilla: A new, even harder logic. Removes the heater core crash fixes and includes a new route for the hardlock section in Ventilation.
### Updated heater core logic
- It will now only lock the lava cooled item if you enable Vanilla difficulty and disable Smallmech
- The lava cooled item will now lock onto the Cooler location.
### Updated item quality logic
- If you enable Smallmech, the Big Shot item changes from "useful" to "trap"  
## Client changes
- Fixed the auto_patch command not filtering out quotes
- Fixed the auto_patch automatically searching for the original installation if you input a bad file path
## Reverts
- (Temporarily) Removed the warps
  -  You will currently reenter your spawn area every time you reload the savefile, allowing you to "warp to start"
- Since the warps don't exist, "Unlock all Warps" has been removed
0.2.0.title: Gato Roboto B-Side Archipelago v0.2.0

0.3.0.description:
# What's new
The warps got a massive new rework, go check em out!  
## Mod
### Warp revamp
- Add revamped warp system
  - New visuals
  - Fixed the logic issues
  - Currently includes Landings site and Nexus
### Bugfixes
- Fixed the terminal icon being bugged
- Fixed a bug where receiving items while dead causes a crash
- Fixed a bug where you cannot receive items while airborne
## Logic
- Fixed the Rebba's quest 2nd item
- Fixed an error in the smallmech-less logic in heater core
## Options
- Renamed "easy" difficulty to "medium"
- Renamed "vanilla" difficulty to "vanilla_expert"
- Changed the "Lava Cooled 1/2" to "Hotboys defeated 1/2"
- Removed the "All warps unlocked properly"
## Client
- Setup guide and game description have been changed
- Added a new client icon
- (Potentially) added UT support for the options
- Attempts to prevent double patching from breaking
## Reverted
- Reverted the item receive save bugfix
  - Indirectly fixes crashes on reload/respawn
  - You now save at the location wherever you pick up an item
0.3.0.title: Gato Roboto B-Side Archipelago v0.3.0

0.4.0.description:
# What's new
## Universal Tracker Support
- You can now use the tracker without the yaml/weighted options!
- A new map with Poptracker integration allows you to see where each item you are missing is!
## Logic
- Simplify the name of the hotboy item
- Improve Logic in Ventilation
  - Remove Dash from Ventilation access
  - Added Right Side logic to the VentLevel 2
  - Created a much easier route for VentLevel 2
  - Easy Smallmech entry with Hopper added
  - Removed the original Vanilla Route (due to a logic error)
## Mod
- Vanilla glitch revert has now been properly implemented (aka "Vanilla" difficulty works now)
## Other
- Disabled random messages in Client
0.4.0.title: Gato Roboto B-Side Archipelago v0.4.0

0.5.0.description:
# What's new
## Loresanity
New option to add checks for lore button/terminals!  
Includes the secret terminals in Nexus and the main terminal!
## Early goal options
You can now adjust the amount of WaterLevels, VentLevels and HeaterCooled needed to beat the game!
## Logic improvements
A lot of logic for "Medium" and other logic issues have been improved!
## Client (re-)connection fix
The client has been rewritten to account for server crashes and reconnections!
# Detailed changes
## Options
- Added new option to adjust how many WaterLevels, LavaCooled and VentLevels you need to goal
- Changed the default for "Nexus Start" to be off
- Changed the default for Glitches to be off
- Added Loresanity
## Client
- Updated the Palette item names (using their in-game counterpart)
- Changed "auto_patch" to "patch"
- Updated the communication to allow reconnects to work
- Prevents issues caused by changing the slot in one client
- The client will attempt to re-initialize every time it is reconnecting
## Logic
- Added Loresanity
- "Medium" difficulty and lower get Health Upgrades as filler items
- Adjusted some Locations to be easier on "Medium" difficulty
  - Removed Decoder: Rocket & Spinjump
  - Added Decoder: Speedrun route for "Medium"
  - Removed TopLeft Nexus: Rocket & Cooler
- Fixed an error in the Incubator logic
- Reordered probabilities to make Spinjump more common
- Fixed Vanilla logic for Lava Cooled check
- Fixed an error in Ventilation logic
0.5.0.title: Gato Roboto B-Side Archipelago v0.5.0

0.5.1.description:
# What's new
- Cleaned up the "Gato Tech" description
- Cleaned up the "Loresanity" description
- Adjusted the README
- Disabled the debug prints in the client
0.5.1.title: Gato Roboto B-Side Archipelago v0.5.1
